content: Ai is going places. Not sure where but definitely places
XD Ts made my day real funny
Sorry your pfp was so cute I was distracted
How are we on this fine night
It is currently the afternoon and my day is going quite alright, how about you kind.. Sir?
Sadly ther are no cookie emojis in Mori server
In ur opinion should I use ramona or karen hmmm
Since ryker and horla also provide arith right?
I do not have g ramona
they provide different things but id say karen
ramona is great but not really the best with kath
yeaa agreed i’m a bit biased against karen cuz i found it hard to charge up karen exalt but theoretically she brings better synergy with the arith, u can probs solve the aliemus problem with relics
it might’ve also been a skill issue on my part
u can never have too much synergy, tho yea like u said ur probs not gonna be using her cards much just relying on her exalt for an extra resource
also horla doesn’t rlly “give” arith, her joy stance lets u retain cards and leftover arith but if u use up the arith it’s not like it’ll carry over
also the good thing abt horla is she can flexibly switch stances
Even when angry, you're still the cutest femboy of the server
I guess Aurora likes clanker (I can't say it because I might get banned)
Cyclone hit town and wrecked the signal tower and destroyed electricity for 2 whole days
Couldn't play anything but now it's back up
Yeah I was in my house when it hit
There were also TWO earthquakes in the span of two days
God threw a temper tantrum but now he's lwk chill
If you ever have any questions, you should ask him, his wisdom is vast
I think he's mad because he remembers the time we crucified his son
I might ask him why he likes that
It means I understand the weakness of flesh

Your the idiot for thinking you can trap brown
Hes too strong ti be contained
But realistically i would recommend you to end his life before throwing him
With the glue stuck on him he would suffer if released
And who knows? If he survive he might come back and won't fall for the same trap
Oh shit you're right he might become stronger
If they survive they won't fall for it twice
They already remember the smell of the chemical for the trap
It's more humane way to end him asap
Well... This is a tough situation. I don't want to kill him and never intended to in the first place. I never thought this trap would actually work but shit it did. But you're right...
Suddenly I don't want to call him an idiot
Tbh, those traps are made to kill rats, not to trap them and release them elsewhere
There is a lot of problem involving rats in general
The moment 90% of his body got stuck it was gg
And even if you release them they might come back
gl trying to peel him off that ish too. You'd probably hurt em a lot
Or become a problem for another home and since they survived the trap they learned to ignore it and it will be a more bigger problem for the others
That glue is stuck on their fur
So it will fk him up too in the long term
Next time I'm just going to get a mouse cage for trapping instead
There is also a problem to where to release them
If you release outside in the city he might go back into your house or go into someone else
Or if you release them in the wild they might die the next day because they are accustomed to urban environments
So you waste your time and money to get them into a place that might get them killed the next day
Sorry about all of those pessimistic talks
It's just i always thought about it when it came to traps
No it's alright I get what you're saying
Putting him out of his misery is definitely the better option but some part of me just screams not to do it <:scared1:1356053141816213507>
The worst timing for a bot XD
Anyways I got my roommate to take care of him and now she's gone outside to do the deed <:Nymphaea_frustrated:1459078117485445288>
At least it was a good call
Generally those traps are made to catch a rat, then close it on the rat and throw it away
People didn't cared if the rat was alive or not
If alive he would have suffered more by starving to death or suffocating
The glue fk them up badly
We can also argue of what is humane or inhumane
Since most of rat traps are meant to kill the rat
If it's to catch them, the same problem about how and where to release them arise
use the plastic box traps that u leave food inside
Haven't been playing the game, for a while and yah still a beginner. But I want to like know more of the lore fr
